name: qo
description: Interactive minimalist SQL query tool for JSON and CSV files. Supports format conversion, aggregation, joins, and pipe-friendly headless output.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install qo: brew install kiki-ki/tap/qo or curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kiki-ki/go-qo/main/install.sh | sh

commands.description: Run a SQL query on JSON or CSV data

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install qo: brew install kiki-ki/tap/qo or curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kiki-ki/go-qo/main/install.sh | sh

args.name: -q
args.description: SQL query string (required for headless mode)

args.name: files
args.description: Input file(s) to query (or use stdin)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install qo: brew install kiki-ki/tap/qo or curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kiki-ki/go-qo/main/install.sh | sh
